description: The Molluso 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Platì, Calabria, Italy, founded in the 1970s. It is involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, arms trafficking, extortion, corruption, gambling, and murder. The clan has a strong presence in the province of Milan, particularly in Buccinasco and Corsico, and is allied with the Barbaro and Papalia 'ndrine.

country_links.evidence_quote: as well as similarly large quantities of cocaine from Colombia
country_links.context: The Molluso 'ndrina imported cocaine from Colombia.

country_links.evidence_quote: imported eighty kilograms of heroin per month from Turkey
country_links.context: The Molluso 'ndrina imported heroin from Turkey.
